steps.title: Match ambition and exclusion
steps.content: The claim says Joanna admires ambition in others to the exclusion of all other qualities. The quotation must show both interest in purposeful people and lack of interest otherwise.

steps.title: Reject weaker character details
steps.content: B states a preference for her father, C mentions ambition along with willingness to work, and D lists abilities unrelated to admiring others. The quotation about people with a purpose and otherwise not at all directly fits the claim. The answer is A.
